mnemonics.title: Hash Properties
mnemonics.content: A CID: Avalanche Effect, Collision Resistance, Input arbitrary-length, Deterministic

acronyms.usage: Used for message authenticity using shared secret

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a meat grinder - any size meat (input) → fixed-size sausage (hash)

analogies.analogy: Like a wax seal on letter - unique to sender, verifiable by anyone, tamper-evident
